name: Searchspring E-Commerce Search and Merchandising API
what_it_does: E-commerce search and merchandising platform with REST API — enabling mid-market retailers to implement AI-powered product search, intelligent autocomplete, behavioral personalization, and merchandising rules, with a feed-based catalog system and a JavaScript integration for storefront rendering, targeting mid-market Shopify, BigCommerce, Magento, and Salesforce Commerce Cloud merchants.
use_cases: Implementing e-commerce search via Searchspring API for relevant product discovery
Building personalized search results via Searchspring for individual shopper behavior
Configuring merchandising rules via Searchspring for product pinning, boosting, and burying
Implementing typeahead autocomplete via Searchspring for high-conversion search UX
Syncing product catalog via Searchspring Feed API for real-time product data updates
not_for: Small catalogs below 1,000 products (Doofinder or Searchanise for small retailers)
General-purpose search beyond e-commerce (Algolia or Elasticsearch for general search)
Enterprise with very complex custom AI requirements (Bloomreach or Coveo for enterprise)
best_when: A mid-market e-commerce retailer needs e-commerce-specific search with merchandising control — where Searchspring provides AI search, personalization, and rule-based merchandising without requiring engineering resources for configuration.
avoid_when: You're a small retailer, need general search, or require enterprise-level AI customization beyond e-commerce merchandising.

auth.notes: Site ID (public) for search queries. Secret key for management/feed API. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. JavaScript Snap SDK for storefront integration. Feed API for catalog sync. Behavioral analytics tracked via JS SDK. No webhooks. Management API for merchandising rules configuration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; trial available via demo
pricing.paid_tiers: Mid-market pricing: custom based on GMV and search volume; typically $1,000-5,000+/month
pricing.notes: Austin, Texas. Founded 2007 by Nathaniel Harrington. Raised $110M+ (Series C $60M, Tritium Partners, Searchspring Fund 2021). 1,200+ mid-market e-commerce customers. E-commerce focus: Shopify Plus, BigCommerce Enterprise, Magento 2, Salesforce Commerce Cloud integrations. Snap SDK (JavaScript) for storefront rendering. AI personalization engine. Merchandising console (drag-and-drop product management). Searchspring Insights (analytics). MACH Alliance member. Acquired: SearchDex (2022). Used by: Solo Stove, Tarte Cosmetics, Fossil, Brooks Running. Mid-market sweet spot (vs. Klevu for SMB, Bloomreach for enterprise).

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise agreement defines limits; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with site ID (public) and secret key (management). JS Snap SDK for storefront. No webhooks. SOC2/GDPR. US-based. Annual contract. Feed-based catalog ingestion. Mid-market focus.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Search queries fully idempotent. Catalog feed: product ID is key for deduplication. Merchandising rule reads idempotent. Behavioral events append-only.
known_agent_gotchas: Site ID (public search API) vs secret key (management API) — two different credentials
Feed-based catalog ingestion — not real-time individual product PUT; must send full or delta feed
Snap SDK (JavaScript) handles search rendering — pure REST API for data, not UI
Annual enterprise contract required — no self-service API access
US data residency only — check compliance requirements for EU customer data
Behavioral tracking via JS SDK required for personalization to function — server-side alone insufficient

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, GDPR. Site ID (public) vs secret key separation. US data residency. Behavioral click data is GDPR-sensitive. Annual enterprise contract includes data processing terms. No OAuth2 granularity.
